overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked urban environment. The player moves from beneath a massive concrete overpass with industrial piping through neon-lit streets with palm trees and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian area beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward beneath the concrete overpass, navigating between support pillars on wet pavement

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with exposed beams and industrial piping
thick rectangular concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting overhead lights
faint glowing signage visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in a cyberpunk city at night. Heavy rain creates reflective pools on the concrete pavement while industrial pipes run overhead. The area is sparsely populated with a sheltered, semi-enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner transitioning from covered to open

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into the open rain-exposed street

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet street toward the sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking with umbrellas in the rain

entered.detail: yellow street sign with 'Martin' text mounted on a pole
dense network of large yellow industrial pipes running parallel to the street
tall street lamps emitting warm orange light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The player exits the sheltered overpass into open rain, crossing a wet asphalt street. A yellow 'Martin' street sign appears on the right while pedestrians with umbrellas walk nearby. Massive industrial pipes run overhead, and orange street lamps illuminate the hazy night.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead pipe infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the massive industrial pipe network overhead

agents.ego_description: briefly looking up at the intricate industrial piping overhead before continuing forward

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to an elevated platform or building entrance
skyscraper with illuminated windows visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to showcase the massive industrial pipe infrastructure running overhead, highlighting the cyberpunk aesthetic of exposed utilities. The player continues walking past a concrete stair structure while rain falls steadily on the asphalt street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with palm trees and parking structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet street, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and approaching a digital billboard

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
multi-story concrete parking structure with open levels
illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wider downtown street lined with palm trees on the left and a concrete parking garage on the right. The player walks past pedestrians carrying umbrellas while orange street lamps cast reflections on the wet asphalt. A digital advertising kiosk glows with colorful neon light ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with traffic control

events.description: approaching intersection with visible traffic light showing green

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward an intersection, passing the digital kiosk and approaching crosswalk lines

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches an urban intersection with visible crosswalk lines and a green traffic light. The digital advertising kiosk passes by on the right as the player continues through the rain-soaked streets. The environment maintains the neon-lit cyberpunk atmosphere with wet reflective surfaces throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the sheltered gloom of an industrial overpass into the vibrant, neon-lit expanse of a rain-soaked downtown district. It begins beneath a massive concrete highway structure where industrial pipes run overhead and rain collects in reflective pools on the pavement. As the camera exits the shelter into the open rain, it crosses a wet asphalt street past a yellow street sign and pedestrians with umbrellas before tilting upward to emphasize the sprawling network of exposed utility pipes. The scene then opens into a wider urban corridor lined with palm trees and a concrete parking garage, where orange street lamps cast a warm glow over the hazy night. Finally, the camera glides past a glowing digital advertising kiosk toward a city intersection with a green traffic light, maintaining a consistent atmosphere of wet, reflective cyberpunk surfaces.
